uplink.description: Weather report (0B/2/00): Davis loop block with temp, humidity, pressure, wind, rain, UV, solar
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds Davis weather frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (decoder-weather.js parseWeather) and mapping its variables to normalized keys. Pressure 1012.97 hPa is atmospheric; barometerTrend is the numeric form of upstream's broken '60.00' string.

uplink.description: TERPM report (0B/3/00): temp, humidity, pressure + PM1/PM2.5/PM10 + battery percent
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds TERPM frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parseTERPM) and mapping to normalized keys. Humidity raw byte 110 is half-percent units -> 55%. Battery is a percentage (extra batteryPercent), not volts.

uplink.description: PM report (0B/2/01): standalone particulate matter PM1/PM2.5/PM10
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds PM frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parsePM). The upstream locale-string date is non-deterministic and is intentionally not emitted.
Synthetic error case: only the 0x0B report-data uplink is supported by this weather-station decoder.
